sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ναγγαί

- Transliteration: Naggai

- Phonetic: nang-gah'-ee

- Definition: Nagge = "illuminating"

1. an ancestor of Christ

- Origin: probably of hebrew origin cf H5052

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Probably of hebrew origin (compare [H5052]); Nangae (that is perhaps Nogach) an Israelite: - Nagge.
